Create file governance/experience/experience_registry.json with content {"bem_id":"BEM-1145","version":"1.0","entries":[{"id":"EXP-001","source":"BEM-930","risk":"report_stops_roadmap","rule":"Reports must immediately chain next action when next_action exists","applies_to":["all_roles"]},{"id":"EXP-002","source":"BEM-946/BEM-947","risk":"local_sha_false_pass","rule":"Local SHA is not release proof when push fails","applies_to":["auditor","worker"]},{"id":"EXP-003","source":"Claude audit BEM-931","risk":"checkpoints_replace_implementation","rule":"Checkpoints are not substitutes for missing protocol artifacts","applies_to":["worker","auditor"]},{"id":"EXP-004","source":"Claude audit BEM-931","risk":"passive_experience_registry","rule":"Analyst and auditor must load relevant experience before proposal/precheck","applies_to":["analyst","auditor"]}],"release_pass":false}
Create file governance/validators/validate_experience_registry.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED = {"id", "source", "risk", "rule", "applies_to"}


def validate(path="governance/experience/experience_registry.json"):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    entries = data.get("entries", [])
    if not isinstance(entries, list) or not entries:
        errors.append("entries list missing")
    seen = set()
    for item in entries:
        missing = sorted(REQUIRED - set(item))
        if missing:
            errors.append(f"{item.get('id','UNKNOWN')}: missing {missing}")
        if item.get("id") in seen:
            errors.append(f"duplicate id {item.get('id')}")
        seen.add(item.get("id"))
        if not item.get("applies_to"):
            errors.append(f"{item.get('id')}: applies_to empty")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS experience_registry")
